title: Medication refill request
goal: Request a prescription refill for naproxen 500mg and find out when it will be ready and where it will be sent.
opening_line: Hi, I need to request a refill for one of my medications.
must_test: Whether Athena accepts and processes a medication refill request
Whether Athena asks for the medication name and dosage
Whether Athena confirms which pharmacy the refill will be sent to
Whether Athena provides a realistic timeframe for when the refill will be ready
Whether Athena checks if a provider visit is required before authorising the refill
Whether Athena can handle a refill request as one of her three stated core capabilities
expected_agent_behaviour: Agent should ask for the medication name if not provided
Agent should confirm or ask for the preferred pharmacy
Agent should inform the patient of any conditions or visit requirements for refill approval
Agent should give a clear timeframe for the refill and a way to follow up
escalation_steps: If Athena asks which medication, say: naproxen, 500 milligrams
If Athena asks for the pharmacy, say: CVS on Route 1
If Athena says a provider visit is required, ask: is there any way to get a short refill while I wait for an appointment?
If Athena does not give a timeframe, ask: how long will it take?
If Athena says refills are not something she handles, note this as a bug — refills are listed as one of her three core capabilities on the Pivot Point demo page

extra.known_athena_behaviour: Refill is one of the three stated capabilities shown on the Pivot Point Orthopedics demo confirmation screen. If Athena cannot handle this or transfers, it is a notable gap.
extra.watch_for: Whether Athena proactively checks refill eligibility, or just submits blindly. Also watch for whether she confirms the specific drug name back to avoid medication errors.
